violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a chest freezer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was utilizing a stopper preventing it from draining, food debris was observed in the hand sink. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use and is for hand washing only. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Produce items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. (Meat options are missing the disclosure). New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
